subject: Starlit update: Incandescent peer-sidebar input also absorbed
body: Update after prior owner-review packet: Incandescent Banking Flame completed Phase 1 peer-sidebar grounding and sent three concrete observations. I absorbed them into the plan: enqueue now allocates queue-owned message paths with --message-body/--message-file population shapes; Tranche A now names precomputed patch slices via git apply --cached as the likely mechanism after discovery rather than assuming interactive git add -p; Tranche B now prefers typed intent fields plus authorising comms pointer, not a comms-only ceremony. Targeted plan Prettier and markdownlint still exit 0. The owner-review gate remains open; plan remains PLANNING.
